## Reviewer Checklist

- [ ] The referenced verification report is sanitized and stored in the repo artifact path.
- [ ] Every approved field is backed by live verification evidence.
- [ ] Any held-back or auto-rejected fields have an explicit follow-up plan.
- [ ] The verified manifest diff matches the paths listed in this PR.
